sigWerErrors.reason: The word 'Sistemleriniz' means 'your systems' (second person plural/formal), while 'Sistemlerin' means 'your systems' (second person singular/informal). This changes the level of formality and the intended audience, but the overall meaning of the sentence remains the same.
